description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum can with a bright yellow exterior, featuring a playful illustration of Pikachu, the iconic Pokémon character, surrounded by small bubbles. The can is cylindrical with a slightly domed top and a pull tab opening mechanism. The label includes nutritional information, product details, and text in both Chinese and English, with a net weight of 330ml clearly indicated. The surface appears smooth and metallic, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The can sits on a white circular base, likely for display or scanning purposes. The overall design is vibrant and eye-catching, making it stand out in urban environments such as parks or sidewalks.
description: A bright yellow aluminum can with Pikachu graphics, nutritional info, and a glossy, smooth finish. The can is cylindrical and features playful, colorful design elements.
description_view_0: This view shows the back of the can with detailed nutritional information, product details, and text in Chinese and English.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the can, focusing on the nutritional facts and additional product certifications.
description_view_2: This view displays the front of the can, prominently featuring the Pikachu illustration and playful bubble graphics.
description_view_3: This side shows the 'OCEAN BOMB' text and part of the Pikachu graphic, with more of the can's branding visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bright yellow background with a large, playful Pikachu illustration and scattered bubble graphics. Typography is bold and clear, with a mix of English and Chinese text, and the overall style is vibrant and cartoonish.
